title: Mechanical Engineering Test
text:
# Mechanical Engineering Test

Test real-world Mechanical Engineering skills that matter in a world with AI. Protected by AI proctoring.

## For jobseekers

Practice your skills and earn a certificate of achievement when you score in the top 25%.

Take a Practice Test

## For companies

Screen real Mechanical Engineering skills, flag human or AI assistance, and interview the right people.

Create a Mechanical Engineering Screening Test

From $7 per candidate

## About the test

The Mechanical Engineering test assesses knowledge of mechanics, thermodynamics, materials science, and electricity through a series of numerical calculations and multiple-choice questions.

The assessment includes solving work-sample tasks, such as:

* Calculating forces acting on a mechanical system that functions as a lever.
* Anticipating how materials will change when temperature and pressure change.
* Understanding and improving electric and internal combustion engines.

Good automotive, industrial, or mechanical engineers require a deep understanding of mechanical principles to make knowledgeable decisions and effectively manage engineering challenges.
